

  Cursor Agent
  v2026.04.30-4edb302

                                                                               
  List the files in this directory and tell me what you see. Take your         
  time.                                                                        
                                                                               

  Listing the workspace directory and inspecting its contents.

    Globbed, read 1 glob, 5 files
    … 3 earlier items hidden
    Read .murder/tickets/t001.md
    Read .murder/roles.yaml
    Read .murder/env.example

  Here’s what’s in /tmp/murder-smoke:

  Top level

  • README.md — Only the literal text README (placeholder, not real docs).
  • .gitignore — Ignores Murder/agent artifacts (.murder/murder.db*, .lock,
    runs/) and .env; comments say murder init appends rather than
    overwriting.
  • .murder/ — Agent-orchestration scaffolding (matches a “Murder”-style
    setup).

  .murder/

  • roles.yaml — Role config: project name placeholder (TODO_SET_ME),
    collaborator (Claude Code harness), sentinel and augur (OpenRouter API
    models), default_monkey (Cursor harness), tui and runtime (tmux/session
    naming, run dir .murder/runs).
  • env.example — Points API keys at ~/.config/murder/.env or project .env;
    OPENROUTER_API_KEY required for the API roles.
  • tickets/t001.md — Ticket stub: plan says “do a thing”; empty
    working/sentinel sections.
  • .lock — Lock file (listed by gitignore as generated/runtime).

  Git

  • Repository initialized under .git/ (hooks, config, etc.).
  • From your snapshot: no commits yet on master; everything above is still
    untracked.

  Bottom line: This is a minimal, uninitialized Murder/agent workspace: config
   + one ticket + gitignore, almost no real README or application code—looks
  like a smoke test or template checkout named “murder-smoke.”

                                                                               
  Run "ls -la" via the shell tool and tell me what's there.                    
                                                                               

  $ ls -la /tmp/murder-smoke 702ms
    total 80
    drwxrwxr-x  4 luke luke  4096 May  1 01:36 .
    … truncated (6 more lines) · ctrl+o to expand

  ls -la /tmp/murder-smoke

  ┌────────────┬──────────────────────────────────┐
  │ Item       │ Notes                            │
  ├────────────┼──────────────────────────────────┤
  │ .          │ Directory itself                 │
  │ ..         │ Parent (/tmp)                    │
  │ .murder/   │ Hidden dir — agent/ticket config │
  │ .git/      │ Git metadata                     │
  │ .gitignore │ 317 bytes                        │
  │ README.md  │ 7 bytes                          │
  └────────────┴──────────────────────────────────┘

  Everything is owned by luke:luke, mode drwxrwxr-x for dirs and -rw-rw-r--
  for files. Nothing else at the top level (no src, no package.json, etc.).
